query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_songs, SUM(CASE WHEN sheetMusicAbc IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_sheet_music, SUM(CASE WHEN sheetMusicAbc IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as without_sheet_music FROM songs;
